documentation.description:
Image I/O: output in PPM, BMP, PNG, and QOI formats; input in BMP, GIF, JPG, PNG, PNM, QOI, and TGA formats

subprograms.name: Read
subprograms.code: procedure Read (Name : in String; Image : in out Holders.Handle)

subprograms.name: Write_BMP
subprograms.code: procedure Write_BMP (File_Name : in String; Image : in Image_Data)

documentation.description: Creates a file named Name; writes Image to it in BMP format; and closes the file

subprograms.name: Write_P3
subprograms.code: procedure Write_P3 (File_Name : in String; Image : in Image_Data)

documentation.description:
Creates a file named File_Name; writes Image to it in P3 format; and closes the file
The file will have Unix (LF) line terminators

subprograms.name: Write_P6
subprograms.code: procedure Write_P6 (File_Name : in String; Image : in Image_Data)

documentation.description:
Creates a file named File_Name; writes Image to it in P6 format; and closes the file
The file will have Unix (LF) line terminators

subprograms.name: Write_PNG
subprograms.code: procedure Write_PNG (File_Name : in String; Image : in Image_Data; Grayscale : in Boolean := False)

documentation.description:
Creates a file named Name; writes Image to it in PNG format; and closes the file
If Grayscale, treats Image as a grayscale image, with all pixels having equal Red, Green, and Blue components. The Red
component is the only one used for the output
Otherwise, treats Image as a color image

subprograms.name: Write_QOI
subprograms.code: procedure Write_QOI (File_Name : in String; Image : in Image_Data)

documentation.description: Creates a file named Name; writes Image to it in QOI format; and closes the file
